## Sources

<!-- Unless the data concerns our most recent in-person meetup, please provide sources! -->

## Declarations

- [ ] All committed data falls into one of the following categories:
  - Historical meetup data that was extracted from Meetup, Internet Archive, etc.
  - Public knowledge about our meetup, e.g. talks, speakers, venues, sponsors
  - Personal data of the commit author
- [ ] Data does NOT contain:
  - Personal data of people other than the commit author
